131 
132     def list(
133             self,
134             fileitem: schemas.FileItem,
135             password: Optional[str] = "",
136             page: int = 1,
137             per_page: int = 0,
138             refresh: bool = False,
139     ) -> List[schemas.FileItem]:
140         """
141         浏览文件
142         :param fileitem: 文件项
143         :param password: 路径密码
144         :param page: 页码
145         :param per_page: 每页数量
146         :param refresh: 是否刷新
147         """
148         if fileitem.type == "file":
149             item = self.get_item(Path(fileitem.path))
150             if item:
151                 return [item]
152             return []
153         resp = RequestUtils(
154             headers=self.__get_header_with_token()
155         ).post_res(
156             self.__get_api_url("/api/fs/list"),
157             json={
158                 "path": fileitem.path,
159                 "password": password,
160                 "page": page,
161                 "per_page": per_page,
162                 "refresh": refresh,
163             },
164         )
165         """
166         {
167             "path": "/t",
168             "password": "",
169             "page": 1,
170             "per_page": 0,
171             "refresh": false
172         }
173         ======================================
174         {
175             "code": 200,
176             "message": "success",
177             "data": {
178                 "content": [
179                 {
180                     "name": "Alist V3.md",
181                     "size": 1592,
182                     "is_dir": false,
183                     "modified": "2024-05-17T13:47:55.4174917+08:00",
184                     "created": "2024-05-17T13:47:47.5725906+08:00",
185                     "sign": "",
186                     "thumb": "",
187                     "type": 4,
188                     "hashinfo": "null",
189                     "hash_info": null
190                 }
191                 ],
192                 "total": 1,
193                 "readme": "",
194                 "header": "",
195                 "write": true,
196                 "provider": "Local"
197             }
198         }
199         """
200 
201         if resp is None:
202             logger.warn(f"【OpenList】请求获取目录 {fileitem.path} 的文件列表失败，无法连接alist服务")
203             return []
204         if resp.status_code != 200:
205             logger.warn(
206                 f"【OpenList】请求获取目录 {fileitem.path} 的文件列表失败，状态码：{resp.status_code}"
207             )
208             return []
209 
210         result = resp.json()
211 
212         if result["code"] != 200:
213             logger.warn(
214                 f'【OpenList】获取目录 {fileitem.path} 的文件列表失败，错误信息：{result["message"]}'
215             )
216             return []
217 
218         return [
219             schemas.FileItem(
220                 storage=self.schema.value,
221                 type="dir" if item["is_dir"] else "file",
222                 path=(Path(fileitem.path) / item["name"]).as_posix() + ("/" if item["is_dir"] else ""),
223                 name=item["name"],
224                 basename=Path(item["name"]).stem,
225                 extension=Path(item["name"]).suffix[1:] if not item["is_dir"] else None,
226                 size=item["size"] if not item["is_dir"] else None,
227                 modify_time=self.__parse_timestamp(item["modified"]),
228                 thumbnail=item["thumb"],
229             )
230             for item in result["data"]["content"] or []
231         ]
232

290     def get_item(
291             self,
292             path: Path,
293             password: Optional[str] = "",
294             page: int = 1,
295             per_page: int = 0,
296             refresh: bool = False,
297     ) -> Optional[schemas.FileItem]:
298         """
299         获取文件或目录，不存在返回None
300         :param path: 文件路径
301         :param password: 路径密码
302         :param page: 页码
303         :param per_page: 每页数量

466     def download(
467             self,
468             fileitem: schemas.FileItem,
469             path: Path = None,
470             password: Optional[str] = "",
471     ) -> Optional[Path]:
472         """
473         下载文件，保存到本地，返回本地临时文件地址
474         :param fileitem: 文件项
475         :param path: 文件保存路径
476         :param password: 文件密码
477         """
478         resp = RequestUtils(
479             headers=self.__get_header_with_token()
480         ).post_res(
481             self.__get_api_url("/api/fs/get"),
482             json={
483                 "path": fileitem.path,
484                 "password": password,
485                 "page": 1,
486                 "per_page": 0,
487                 "refresh": False,
488             },
489         )
490         """
491         {
492             "code": 200,
493             "message": "success",
494             "data": {
495                 "name": "[ANi]輝夜姬想讓人告白～天才們的戀愛頭腦戰～[01][1080P][Baha][WEB-DL].mp4",
496                 "size": 924933111,
497                 "is_dir": false,
498                 "modified": "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z",
499                 "created": "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z",
500                 "sign": "1v0xkMQz_uG8fkEOQ7-l58OnbB-g4GkdBlUBcrsApCQ=:0",
501                 "thumb": "",
502                 "type": 2,
503                 "hashinfo": "null",
504                 "hash_info": null,
505                 "raw_url": "xxxxxx",
506                 "readme": "",
507                 "header": "",
508                 "provider": "UrlTree",
509                 "related": null
510             }
511         }
512         """
513         if not resp:
514             logger.warn(f"【OpenList】请求获取文件 {path} 失败，无法连接alist服务")
515             return None
516         if resp.status_code != 200:
517             logger.warn(f"【OpenList】请求获取文件 {path} 失败，状态码：{resp.status_code}")
518             return None
519 
520         result = resp.json()
521         if result["code"] != 200:
522             logger.warn(f'【OpenList】获取文件 {path} 失败，错误信息：{result["message"]}')
523             return None
524 
525         if result["data"]["raw_url"]:
526             download_url = result["data"]["raw_url"]
527         else:
528             download_url = UrlUtils.adapt_request_url(self.__get_base_url, f"/d{fileitem.path}")
529             if result["data"]["sign"]:
530                 download_url = download_url + "?sign=" + result["data"]["sign"]
531 
532         if not path:
533             local_path = settings.TEMP_PATH / fileitem.name
534         else:
535             local_path = path / fileitem.name
536 
537         with requests.get(download_url, headers=self.__get_header_with_token(), stream=True) as r:
538             r.raise_for_status()
539             with open(local_path, "wb") as f:
540                 for chunk in r.iter_content(chunk_size=8192):
541                     f.write(chunk)
542 
543         if local_path.exists():
544             return local_path
545         return None
546
